Consulta

B2B growth system

We build the system behind B2B growth

Rotata turns fragmented revenue operations into one operating model that marketing and sales can read, run and improve.

Review the system See solutions
Arquitectura CRMClaridad pipelineAutomatización controlada
Vista operativa Sistema conectado
Modelo CRMestructurado
Pipelinelegible
Automatizaciónorquestada
Datosseguros
Señalespriorizadas
Seguimientoconsistente
Explorar sistema
01

Fricción

Market problem: fragmentation

Growth breaks when CRM, targeting, follow-up and reporting run as separate projects.

01

Different teams use different stage logic

02

Lead quality is debated instead of defined

03

Signals do not reach the owner who should act

04

Reporting describes activity but not movement

02

Modelo operativo

System overview

The system connects inputs, rules, workflows and outcomes in one commercial sequence.

01

Structured data entry

02

Qualification rules

03

Lifecycle and pipeline logic

04

Owner routing

05

Review-ready reporting

06

Feedback loops

03

Capas del sistema

Solution pillars

Each pillar fixes a different source of commercial friction.

Pipeline

Make stage movement, ownership and bottlenecks readable.

Intelligence

Use fit, enrichment and signals to set priority.

Conversion

Reduce avoidable drop-off between touchpoints and teams.

Alignment

Keep marketing and sales inside one operating language.

04

Modelo operativo

Services snapshot

Rotata delivers connected capabilities inside the wider system.

01

CRM architecture

02

Data enrichment

03

Outbound design

04

Signal activation

05

Sales workflow

06

Reporting and integrations

05

Cadencia

Process snapshot

The order matters because bad structure should not be automated faster.

  1. 01Diagnose
  2. 02Design
  3. 03Implement
  4. 04Optimize
06

Lectura de impacto

Proof

Cases and operating metrics matter only when the system becomes easier to read and govern in live use.

01

Shared stage definitions

02

Rule-based lead routing

03

Pipeline reviews inside the CRM

04

Dashboards people trust

07

Stack conectado

Ecosystem

Platforms support the architecture. The system remains the product.

HubSpot

CRM architecture, workflow automation and revenue reporting

Explorar

ZoomInfo

Account data depth, enrichment and targeting intelligence

Explorar

Synapsale

Account engagement signals, timing and prioritization

Explorar
08

Modelo operativo

ROI framing

Return improves when the system removes expensive friction.

01

Better qualification

02

Faster response

03

Cleaner handoffs

04

Stronger forecast confidence
